creator: han@math.jussieu.fr
text:
- Update to the current stable version: 1.0.0
- this version need to update the CocoaLib dependency to 9950
- The printing bug announced in Revision of the port 289240 doesn't appear anymore with giac 1.0.0 so we can use again the newer fltk file: fltk-giac.tar.gz
- Use the PORTDOCS and PORTDATA macro in the Makefile as suggested by the previous commiter. 
  So  the very long pkg-plist has shrink alot and the diff file was too big to submit.


* So the submitted diff file  is  gzipped and renamed with a .txt extension *
   patch100.diff.gz.txt

   The file patch100.diff is also available here:
   http://www.math.jussieu.fr/~han/xcas/sources/patch100.diff

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
